desc: Round-5 C6: a bare `$computed` READ inside a `.debounce`/`.throttle` template handler (lifted into `<script setup>` per Spike-012 R4/scriptContext) stayed bare — `q.value = label;` assigns the `ComputedRef` OBJECT to a `Ref<string>`, not its unwrapped value (TS2322 + wrong at runtime). Vue's template compiler auto-unwraps a bare computed name in TEMPLATE context, but the lifted handler body is real `<script setup>` code where that auto-unwrap does not apply — the same script-vs-template split R4 already applied to `$data`/`$props`(model)/`$refs` reads, but R4 did not cover a bare `$computed` identifier. Fix (rewriteTemplateExpression.ts): a new `Identifier` visitor appends `.value` to a bare computed-name READ ONLY when `scriptContext === true` (the lifted-handler path); template context (the entire existing corpus) is unaffected — a bare computed name stays bare. The other five targets already read the debounce-lifted computed correctly via their own reactivity conventions (React/Solid call the accessor, Svelte/Angular getters/`$derived` return the value directly), so they are unaffected by this bug and this fix. Found by the shape-matrix torture harness (debounce-lift-cross/computed-read-in-debounce).
